books.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: The first book in the beloved Harry Potter series. Young Harry Potter discovers he's a wizard on his 11th birthday and begins his magical education at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: Harry Potter's second year at Hogwarts brings fresh horrors including an outrageously annoying house-elf, a spirit who haunts the girls' bathroom, and the unwanted attentions of Ron Weasley's younger sister.

books.title: The Hobbit
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.description: Bilbo Baggins is a hobbit who enjoys a comfortable, unambitious life but finds himself swept into an epic quest to reclaim the dwarf homeland Erebor from the fearsome dragon Smaug.

books.author: George Orwell
books.description: A dystopian social science fiction novel and cautionary tale about the dangers of totalitarianism. Introduced concepts like Big Brother, doublethink, and the Thought Police.

books.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
books.author: Harper Lee
books.description: Set in the American South during the 1930s, this Pulitzer Prize-winning masterpiece explores racial injustice and moral growth through the eyes of young Scout Finch.

books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
books.description: Set in the Jazz Age on Long Island, the novel depicts narrator Nick Carraway's interactions with the mysterious millionaire Jay Gatsby and his obsession with Daisy Buchanan.

books.title: Pride and Prejudice
books.author: Jane Austen
books.description: A romantic novel of manners that follows the character development of Elizabeth Bennet, who learns about the repercussions of hasty judgments and the value of true love.

books.title: The Catcher in the Rye
books.author: J.D. Salinger
books.description: The story of Holden Caulfield, a teenage boy expelled from prep school who wanders around New York City questioning the phoniness of the adult world.

books.title: The Lord of the Rings
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.description: An epic high-fantasy novel following hobbit Frodo Baggins as he and the Fellowship embark on a quest to destroy the One Ring and defeat the Dark Lord Sauron.

books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.description: Set in the distant future, this science fiction epic tells the story of young Paul Atreides, whose family accepts stewardship of the desert planet Arrakis, source of the universe's most valuable substance.

books.title: The Da Vinci Code
books.author: Dan Brown
books.description: A mystery thriller following symbologist Robert Langdon and cryptologist Sophie Neveu as they investigate a murder in the Louvre Museum with far-reaching religious implications.

books.title: Gone Girl
books.author: Gillian Flynn
books.description: On the morning of their fifth wedding anniversary, Amy Dunne disappears. Her husband Nick becomes the prime suspect, but nothing about this case is what it seems.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A philosophical novel about Santiago, an Andalusian shepherd boy who yearns to travel the world in search of a treasure he dreamed about, and finds his Personal Legend.

books.title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.description: An exploration of human history from the cognitive revolution 70,000 years ago to the present, examining how Homo sapiens came to dominate the earth.

books.title: A Brief History of Time
books.author: Stephen Hawking
books.description: A landmark volume in science writing that touches on topics including cosmology, space and time, black holes, the Big Bang, and the nature of time itself.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship covering the principles, patterns, and practices of writing clean, maintainable code for software developers.

books.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
books.author: Andrew Hunt & David Thomas
books.description: Examines the core process of software development — from personal responsibility and career development to architectural techniques that keep code flexible and adaptable.

books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.description: An easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones. Features a proven framework for improving every day using the power of tiny changes.

books.title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
books.author: Daniel Kahneman
books.description: A groundbreaking tour of the mind explaining the two systems that drive the way we think: System 1 (fast, intuitive) and System 2 (slow, deliberate).

books.title: Meditations
books.author: Marcus Aurelius
books.description: A series of personal writings by Roman Emperor Marcus Aurelius recording his private notes to himself and ideas on Stoic philosophy and self-improvement.

books.title: Crime and Punishment
books.author: Fyodor Dostoevsky
books.description: A psychological study of a destitute student who rationally justifies the murder of a pawnbroker, then struggles with guilt, paranoia, and the inevitability of justice.

books.title: One Hundred Years of Solitude
books.author: Gabriel García Márquez
books.description: A multi-generational story of the Buendía family in the fictional town of Macondo. A landmark of magical realism and 20th century literature.

books.title: The Power of Now
books.author: Eckhart Tolle
books.description: A guide to spiritual enlightenment teaching readers to live in the present moment and overcome pain and suffering through mindful awareness.

books.title: Educated
books.author: Tara Westover
books.description: A memoir about a young woman kept out of school who leaves her survivalist family and goes on to earn a PhD from Cambridge University.

books.title: Design Patterns
books.author: Gang of Four
books.description: A catalog of 23 classic software design patterns with examples in C++. Essential reading for software engineers and architects building object-oriented systems.
